events.producer: Webhook worker and tenant configuration mutation surfaces
events.payloadContract: Payload contains only key and the platform envelope fields organisationId, eventName, idempotencyKey, createdAt, and source id. Arbitrary payload is not allowed for canonical tenant.config.changed.
events.orderingExpectation: ordered per organisation and idempotency key; no cross-tenant ordering guarantee
events.retryPolicy: worker/webhook delivery retries with bounded backoff and records exhausted attempts
events.dlqPolicy: dead-letter entry stores tenant, event type, attempts, payload summary, and last error; redrive uses a fresh idempotency key
events.retention: event rows and dead-letter evidence retained according to tenant data retention and audit policy
events.tenantIsolation: organisationId partitions event persistence, delivery, DLQ, and redrive; consumers must re-check tenant context
events.auditRelationship: tenant.config.changed is linked to producer mutation audit and redrive/delivery audit evidence.

environmentBehaviour.dev: local composed event/webhook provider; fixture payloads allowed only in tests
environmentBehaviour.test: deterministic event worker and repository proofs run with disposable data
environmentBehaviour.staging: prod-shape queue/webhook topology with sandbox endpoints and redrive rehearsal
environmentBehaviour.prod: real tenant event delivery only; no fixture/test event emission or destructive redrive proof

events.breakingChangePolicy: Schema changes require a new schemaVersion, backwards-compatible consumers, semantic artefact updates, and migration/redrive compatibility evidence before V2 promotion.

events.producer: Workflow engine and scheduled job use cases
events.payloadContract: Payload contains only reportId and the platform envelope fields organisationId, eventName, idempotencyKey, createdAt, and source id. Arbitrary payload is not allowed for canonical report.run.
events.orderingExpectation: ordered per organisation and idempotency key; no cross-tenant ordering guarantee
events.retryPolicy: worker/webhook delivery retries with bounded backoff and records exhausted attempts
events.dlqPolicy: dead-letter entry stores tenant, event type, attempts, payload summary, and last error; redrive uses a fresh idempotency key
events.retention: event rows and dead-letter evidence retained according to tenant data retention and audit policy
events.tenantIsolation: organisationId partitions event persistence, delivery, DLQ, and redrive; consumers must re-check tenant context
events.auditRelationship: report.run is linked to producer mutation audit and redrive/delivery audit evidence.

environmentBehaviour.dev: local composed event/webhook provider; fixture payloads allowed only in tests
environmentBehaviour.test: deterministic event worker and repository proofs run with disposable data
environmentBehaviour.staging: prod-shape queue/webhook topology with sandbox endpoints and redrive rehearsal
environmentBehaviour.prod: real tenant event delivery only; no fixture/test event emission or destructive redrive proof

events.breakingChangePolicy: Schema changes require a new schemaVersion, backwards-compatible consumers, semantic artefact updates, and migration/redrive compatibility evidence before V2 promotion.

schema.arbitraryPayloadJustification: fixture event intentionally exercises generic event-bus storage/retry/DLQ behaviour and is excluded from product/platform readiness semantics

events.payloadContract: fixture-only payload; not a product/platform contract and not available to generated UI
events.idempotencyKey: fixture idempotency key scoped to disposable proof/test tenant
events.orderingExpectation: fixture ordering only within the event-bus proof under disposable tenant data
events.retryPolicy: uses event-bus retry path only to prove infrastructure behaviour
events.dlqPolicy: uses event-bus DLQ path only to prove infrastructure behaviour
events.tenantIsolation: disposable proof/test tenant only; never production tenant data
events.auditRelationship: none for product audit; fixture redrive evidence remains proof-only

environmentBehaviour.dev: allowed only inside local proof/test fixture
environmentBehaviour.test: allowed only inside deterministic automated tests
environmentBehaviour.staging: forbidden except isolated rehearsal fixture that is excluded from readiness semantics

events.breakingChangePolicy: may change with tests because it is not canonical; cannot be promoted to product semantics without a new canonical event record
events.fixtureRationale: webhook subscription and delivery tests use this synthetic event name
